title: Geometric Proof of the Metric Curvature Formula

visual_sequence.observation: Curvature appears as circulation around shrinking coordinate cells.
Scale factors define the coordinate field being circulated.
The limit of boundary circulation yields local curvature.
The flat case sets the zero-curvature baseline.
